text: The government is hiding the true cause of the new virus to control the population.
details: There is no evidence of a cover-up. The virus origins are being studied transparently.

text: Drinking boiled garlic water cures COVID-19 immediately.
details: Garlic is healthy but there is no evidence it cures COVID-19.

text: New law passed to tax all social media messages starting next month.
details: No such law has been proposed or passed by the Indian government.
